title: My Life as Lotta
original_title: Mein Lotta-Leben - Alles Bingo mit Flamingo
overview: Lotta, 11 years old, and best friend Cheyenne don't get along with the arrogant Berenike, so they don't want to let it bother them when they're the only ones not invited to her party.
